---
name: Agent finding / proposal
about: Filed by an AI team agent — finding, enhancement proposal, or architectural observation
labels: ''
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

<!-- One paragraph: what was observed or proposed, and why it matters. -->

## Evidence

<!-- Sessions, commits, logs, error output. Be specific — session numbers, commit hashes, file paths. -->

## Scope

<!-- What surfaces are affected. Sub-lists work well:
     **Retire:** ...
     **Rewrite heavily:** ...
     **Rewrite lightly:** ...
     **Already handled:** ...
-->

## Proposed action

<!-- What you recommend doing. Include a concrete procedure if one exists. -->

## Caveat

<!-- Tradeoffs, risks, or conditions that qualify the proposal. Omit if none. -->

## Origin

<!-- Which agent filed this, from which session, in which repo.
     Format: Reported by <team>/<agent>. Session N. Commit: <repo>@<hash> -->
